rationale: Educ. Code §11.185 governs school district early childhood literacy and mathematics proficiency plans. It contains no reference to homestead exemption amounts or Tax Code §11.13, so raising the exemption from $140,000 to $200,000 does not conflict with this provision.
quote: The board of trustees of each school district shall adopt and post on the district's Internet website early childhood literacy and mathematics proficiency plans that set specific annual goals for the following five school years to reach quantifiable goals for student performance in reading and mathematics at each campus.
_note: No direct or indirect reference to homestead exemption values, Tax Code §11.13, or property tax appraisal amounts found in this statute.
